heading: Technical assistance
label: 300ff–29 Technical assistance
text: The Secretary shall provide technical assistance in administering and coordinating the activities authorized under , including technical assistance for the development and implementation of statewide coordinated statements of need.section 300ff–22 of this title
notes: Amendments2009— repealed , and revived the provisions of this section as in effect on . See 2006 Amendment note and Effective Date of 2009 Amendment; Revival of Section note below.Pub.
